author: Dime
msg: The confusion is that BEP-20 is not on Binance Chain, but on Binance Smart Chain. Binance Chain is the original chain of Binance which does not support smart contracts and BEP-20 tokens. The first time I was not sure because of that and had to risk $5 to see if I will receive it 😀
